title: Fresh Animations x Bare Bones Better Sheep
description: Improved sheep model with warm and cold variants with fresh animations
body:
This pack revamps the sheep model and texture to better fit with modern minecraft, while staying true to the vanilla style. 

The sheep have been given a snout and ears, and warm and cold variants have been added that have horns. Their wool coats are also different sizes.

Most importantly, the model is now pixel perfect, meaning that every pixel is the same size (no more strange scaling with the wool).

---

Requires [_Entity Texture Features_](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures), [_Entity Model Features_](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitymodelfeatures) (or Optifine) and [_Fresh Animations_](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) version 1.10.0 or higher.

This is the version supporting fresh animations. You can find the vanilla version [here](https://modrinth.com/project/bare-bones-better-sheep).
\
Note that this is _not_ an addon pack. You will not need the vanilla version if you use the fresh animations one.

I have also created packs that improve [_chickens_](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations-x-bare-bones-better-chickens) and [_pigs._](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations-x-bare-bones-better-pigs)

---

![Black sheep in a snowy plains. They have large horns and a wooly coat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/shnDFshD/images/aeaea1c7ff221219de8f726fee51efc919ce5018.png)

![Brown sheep in a savannah biome. They have long horns and a thin coat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/shnDFshD/images/bb58a8a8373291e3d0768077f422c48ba19751dd.png)

![A sheared and a baby white sheep in a plains biome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/shnDFshD/images/c46846516703c15ea0aea85f9c3741ba8136acd5.png)
